input.command:
python3 -c "
import urllib.request
import io
import sys

# Try using PyPDF2 or pdfminer if available
try:
    import pdfminer
    from pdfminer.high_level import extract_text
    text = extract_text('/Users/canerden/Desktop/masterfilescanerden/Can Erden - CV.pdf')
    print(text)
except ImportError:
    print('pdfminer not available')

try:
    import PyPDF2
    with open('/Users/canerden/Desktop/masterfilescanerden/Can Erden - CV.pdf', 'rb') as f:
        reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader(f)
        for page in reader.pages:
            print(page.extract_text())
except ImportError:
    print('PyPDF2 not available')
" 2>/dev/null
input.description: Try Python PDF libraries to extract text from the PDF

content.content:
Can Erden 

Email: ycanerden@gmail.com 

Mobile: 90 534 582 52 61 

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/can-erden 

Location: Istanbul, Turkey 

Professional Summary 

A business leader with expertise in scaling technology ventures and driving international growth initiatives. 
Track record of leading cross-cultural teams and developing innovative solutions in environmental 
technology and AI sectors. Proven ability to translate complex technical challenges into market 
opportunities, while navigating diverse business environments from startups to Fortune 500 companies. 

Experience 

Head of Growth & Product | Rapider AI | New York Remote | 07/2024 - Present 

●  Lead product strategy and go-to-market initiatives for an AI-powered SaaS low-code platform 

across three continents 

●  Drive product roadmap development and launch campaigns in key international markets 
●  Oversee global product expansion strategies and market entry initiatives 
●  Collaborate with cross-functional teams across New York, Istanbul, and Vietnam offices to ensure 

successful product delivery 

●  Define and execute growth strategies to accelerate market adoption across diverse regions 

Co-Founder | Gobo | Istanbul | 02/2024 - Present 

●  Founded an environmental intelligence platform that leverages AI to analyze and optimize indoor air 

quality across commercial and public spaces 

●  Lead product vision and strategy, ensuring compliance with international environmental standards 

EPA, WHO, EU, WELL, LEED 

●  Direct a team of 14 developers in building scalable data analytics infrastructure processing real-time 

environmental data 

●  Develop go-to-market strategies for initial European market entry, focusing on sustainable building 

certification requirements 

●  Design data visualization solutions to make complex environmental data accessible for facility 

managers and building operators 

Business Development & Strategy Team Member | Koç Yaşa | Istanbul, Turkey | 02/2023 - 02/2024 

●  Played a role in Turkey's largest medical sector M&A deal $50M, conducting market analysis and 

supporting due diligence processes 

●  Contributed strategic initiatives within Turkey's largest holding company, focusing on digital 

transformation and international expansion 

●  Developed comprehensive market entry strategies for new business ventures 
●  Collaborated with cross-functional teams to identify and evaluate strategic investment opportunities 
●  Prepared executive-level presentations and strategic recommendations for senior management 

Project Intern | A ve A Medical | Istanbul, Turkey | 08/2022 - 09/2022 

●  Researched and developed a blockchain-based project plan to enhance medical device registration 

processes. 

 
 
 Technology Application Intern | Miniso | Istanbul, Turkey | 07/2022 - 08/2022 

●  Conducted extensive research and developed a business plan for integrating blockchain technology 

across global retail operations. 

Student Assistant, Domestic Recruitment | Özyeğin University | Istanbul, Turkey | 07/2019 - 08/2019 

●  Acted as a university ambassador at promotional days, engaging with prospective students and 

conducting campus tours. 

Education 

Bachelor of Arts in Entrepreneurship | Özyeğin University | Istanbul, Turkey | 2017 - 2023 

●  Full scholarship 100% 
●  Specialization: Technology Entrepreneurship and Innovation Management 
●  Key Coursework: Social Entrepreneurship, Digital Innovation, Strategic Management, Financial 

Analysis 

●  Notable Achievement: High Honor Student in the final year 

Cekmekoy Final High School | Istanbul, Turkey | 2013 - 2017 

Doga College | Istanbul, Turkey  

Projects 

Project Manager | Turkish Cerebrovascular Diseases Society | Istanbul, Turkey | 04/2022 - 05/2022 

●  Led a project to raise stroke awareness using NFTs, managing blockchain integrations and project 

development. 

Co-Founder | Online Basketball Manager | Istanbul, Turkey | 07/2019 - 12/2020 

●  Launched a mobile basketball coaching game, achieving over 4,000 downloads with no marketing 

budget. 

Skills & Certificates 

●  Certificates: Scrum Team Member Scrum Inc., 2023, Project Management Google, 2023, 

Inbound Hubspot, 2023, Project Management Skills LinkedIn, 2022, OOPT Cambridge, 2018 

●  Languages: English (fluent), Turkish (native) 
●  Technical Skills: MS Office, Project Management Tools Jira, Trello, ClickUp, Miro), Design Tools 

Figma, Canva, Balsamiq), No-code Tools Flutterflow, Bubble, Glide) 

References: Available upon request.

content.text:
Here is the full extracted text content from "/Users/canerden/Desktop/masterfilescanerden/Can Erden - CV.pdf":

---

**Can Erden**

Email: ycanerden@gmail.com
Mobile: 90 534 582 52 61
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/can-erden
Location: Istanbul, Turkey

---

**Professional Summary**

A business leader with expertise in scaling technology ventures and driving international growth initiatives. Track record of leading cross-cultural teams and developing innovative solutions in environmental technology and AI sectors. Proven ability to translate complex technical challenges into market opportunities, while navigating diverse business environments from startups to Fortune 500 companies.

---

**Experience**

**Head of Growth & Product | Rapider AI | New York Remote | 07/2024 - Present**
- Lead product strategy and go-to-market initiatives for an AI-powered SaaS low-code platform across three continents
- Drive product roadmap development and launch campaigns in key international markets
- Oversee global product expansion strategies and market entry initiatives
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams across New York, Istanbul, and Vietnam offices to ensure successful product delivery
- Define and execute growth strategies to accelerate market adoption across diverse regions

**Co-Founder | Gobo | Istanbul | 02/2024 - Present**
- Founded an environmental intelligence platform that leverages AI to analyze and optimize indoor air quality across commercial and public spaces
- Lead product vision and strategy, ensuring compliance with international environmental standards (EPA, WHO, EU, WELL, LEED)
- Direct a team of 14 developers in building scalable data analytics infrastructure processing real-time environmental data
- Develop go-to-market strategies for initial European market entry, focusing on sustainable building certification requirements
- Design data visualization solutions to make complex environmental data accessible for facility managers and building operators

**Business Development & Strategy Team Member | Koc Yasa | Istanbul, Turkey | 02/2023 - 02/2024**
- Played a role in Turkey's largest medical sector M&A deal ($50M), conducting market analysis and supporting due diligence processes
- Contributed strategic initiatives within Turkey's largest holding company, focusing on digital transformation and international expansion
- Developed comprehensive market entry strategies for new business ventures
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to identify and evaluate strategic investment opportunities
- Prepared executive-level presentations and strategic recommendations for senior management

**Project Intern | A ve A Medical | Istanbul, Turkey | 08/2022 - 09/2022**
- Researched and developed a blockchain-based project plan to enhance medical device registration processes

**Technology Application Intern | Miniso | Istanbul, Turkey | 07/2022 - 08/2022**
- Conducted extensive research and developed a business plan for integrating blockchain technology across global retail operations

**Student Assistant, Domestic Recruitment | Ozyegin University | Istanbul, Turkey | 07/2019 - 08/2019**
- Acted as a university ambassador at promotional days, engaging with prospective students and conducting campus tours

---

**Education**

**Bachelor of Arts in Entrepreneurship | Ozyegin University | Istanbul, Turkey | 2017 - 2023**
- Full scholarship (100%)
- Specialization: Technology Entrepreneurship and Innovation Management
- Key Coursework: Social Entrepreneurship, Digital Innovation, Strategic Management, Financial Analysis
- Notable Achievement: High Honor Student in the final year

**Cekmekoy Final High School | Istanbul, Turkey | 2013 - 2017**

**Doga College | Istanbul, Turkey**

---

**Projects**

**Project Manager | Turkish Cerebrovascular Diseases Society | Istanbul, Turkey | 04/2022 - 05/2022**
- Led a project to raise stroke awareness using NFTs, managing blockchain integrations and project development

**Co-Founder | Online Basketball Manager | Istanbul, Turkey | 07/2019 - 12/2020**
- Launched a mobile basketball coaching game, achieving over 4,000 downloads with no marketing budget

---

**Skills & Certificates**

- Certificates: Scrum Team Member (Scrum Inc., 2023), Project Management (Google, 2023), Inbound (Hubspot, 2023), Project Management Skills (LinkedIn, 2022), OOPT (Cambridge, 2018)
- Languages: English (fluent), Turkish (native)
- Technical Skills: MS Office, Project Management Tools (Jira, Trello, ClickUp, Miro), Design Tools (Figma, Canva, Balsamiq), No-code Tools (Flutterflow, Bubble, Glide)

References: Available upon request.
